name: mira-generate-lambda
description: Bedrock proxy + meal plan + recommend short-circuits for the MemoryAisle iOS client.
comment: AWS SDK v3 is provided by the Lambda NODEJS_22_X runtime. Listing it here as a dependency would force a node_modules install at deploy time and risk ESM resolution drift at cold start; the runtime resolver picks up '@aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime' from /var/runtime.
